title: satureja menthifolia
intro: Satureja menthifolia, also known as the mint-sage subsp, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Satureja menthifolia include relief from digestive issues, reduced stress and anxiety, and improved respiratory health. This herb can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, and is often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
